summary:
Main
in Weekly Demolition Reports 17/12/2024
The ship recycling markets across all major destinations continue to face a challenging and subdued environment, each grappling with unique hurdles. Source: Best Oasis Limited

[Page 1]
Weekly Ship Recycling Report
07 December - 16 December 2024
Visit : www.best-oasis.com Head Office: 3201, Saba Tower 1, Cluster E, Jumeirah Lake Towers, Dubai, U.A.E
Email: bol@bol.ae Contact: +971 4575 4667

[Page 2]
Highlights of the week
The ship recycling markets across all major destinations continue to face a challenging and subdued environment, each grappling with unique hurdles. India
remains stagnant, with both vessel demand and supply notably absent, compounded by the lack of the usual year-end uptick in activity.
